productName: Heavenly Buds Infused Bubble Hash Little Snappers - Zetsu - 2pk (2x0.5g)
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Zetsu, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a versatile, anytime balance. Pace yourself.
